items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-95 northbound between 1.1 miles south of Exit 10: PA 291 EAST - BARTRAM AVE/CARGO CITY and .3 miles south of Exit 10: PA 291 EAST - BARTRAM AVE/CARGO CITY. There is a lane restriction.
